mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_client_config (source_type, source_id, target_type, target_id, ext_param, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{extParam}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_client_config SET source_type = #{sourceType}, source_id = #{sourceId}, target_type = #{targetType}, target_id = #{targetId}, ext_param = #{extParam}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ai_client_config WHERE source_id = #{sourceId} AND target_id = #{targetId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_client_config WHERE source_id = #{sourceId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM ai_client_config WHERE target_id = #{targetId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM ai_client_config WHERE source_id = #{sourceId} AND target_id = #{targetId}
SELECT * FROM ai_client_config WHERE source_type = #{sourceType} AND source_id = #{sourceId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM ai_client_config WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM ai_client_config ORDER BY id DESC
